description: BBB_10sec.mp4 audio track → showwavespic (audio-in, video-out cross-media-type filter, Wave 7 #37) → libx264 → mp4. The pipeline auto-fills output_media_type=video from the cross-media filter registry; the validator enforces the outbound edge type matches; the runtime routes the node through the complex-filter-graph code path so the buffersink media type is video while the buffersrc remains audio.
